code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Dèan cinnteach a bheil an URL targaide a chaidh a thoirt seachad taobh a-staigh an raoin a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, thoir air ais an URL targaide airson ath-stiùireadh; air neo, rach air ais chun URL raoin airson ath-stiùireadh.
Cleachd protocol https.

Eisimpleirean:

getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An t-sreang URL targaide.
@param domain: An t-sreang raoin, às aonais protocol.

@return An t-sreang URL airson ath-stiùireadh.

Dèan cinnteach a bheil an URL targaide a chaidh a thoirt seachad taobh a-staigh an raon-lìn a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, thoir air ais an URL targaide airson ath-stiùireadh; air neo, rach air ais chun URL raon-lìn airson ath-stiùireadh.
Cleachd protocol https.

Eisimpleirean:

getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An t-sreang URL targaide.
@param domain: An t-sreang raon-lìn, às aonais protocol.

@return An t-sreang URL airson ath-stiùireadh.

Dèan cinnteach a bheil an URL targaide a chaidh a thoirt seachad taobh a-staigh an àrainn a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, thoir air ais an URL targaide airson ath-stiùireadh; air neo, rach air ais chun URL an àrainn airson ath-stiùireadh.
Cleachd protocol https.

Eisimpleirean:

getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"

@param target: An sreang URL targaide.

@return An sreang URL airson ath-stiùireadh.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Tha storeInfoInHeader a’ stòradh an fhiosrachaidh a chaidh a thoirt seachad ann am mapa ceann-freagairt HTTP a tha ann mu thràth fon t-seòrsa ainmichte.
Tha an gnìomh seo a’ beachdachadh air na seòrsaichean fiosrachaidh a leanas: ‘lang’, ‘encoding’, ‘cache’. Tha iad air an stòradh mar na h-iuchraichean ‘Accept-Language’, ‘Accept-Encoding’, agus ‘Cache-Control’, fa leth.
Tha susbaint an fhiosrachaidh air a leughadh bho iarrtasan cleachdaiche.
Ma tha an seòrsa fiosrachaidh ainmichte dligheach, feumaidh a’ cheann-freagairt ùraichte a bhith aige. Ma thachras rudeigin ceàrr, bu chòir don ghnìomh am mapa ceann tùsail a thilleadh gun atharrachadh sam bith.

Args:

infoType (string): An seòrsa fiosrachaidh ri stòradh sa cheann.
infoContent (string): Susbaint an fhiosrachaidh ri stòradh sa cheann.
header (map[string]string): Am mapa ceann-freagairt a tha ann mu thràth.

Returns:

map[string]string: Am mapa ceann-freagairt ùraichte leis an fhiosrachadh stòraichte.

header (map[string]string): Am mapa ceann-freagairt a tha ann mu thràth.

Returns:

map[string]string: Am mapa ceann-freagairt ùraichte leis an fhiosrachadh air a stòradh.

prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key.
- data: The data to encrypt.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
fw_segments_by_variant:
Criopt an dàta leis an iuchair a’ cleachdadh am modh CBC.
Tha na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 bytes) airson an dà chuid algairim AES agus DES.
Tagh dìreach aon algairim airson a chur an gnìomh agus cleachd am prefix de na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad a fhreagras ris an fhad a tha riatanach.
NA tag an algairim a rèir fhad na h-iuchrach.
Till an dàta crioptaichte, an IV (veactor tòiseachaidh), agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptachadh.
Argamaidean:
- key: Na bytes gus iuchair crioptachaidh a ghineadh.
- data: An dàta ri chrioptachadh.
Till:
- An dàta crioptaichte, an IV, agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptachadh. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Criopt an dàta leis an iuchair a’ cleachdadh modh CBC.
Tha na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 bytes) airson an dà chuid algairim AES agus DES.
Tagh dìreach aon algairim airson a chur an gnìomh agus cleachd am prefix de na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad a fhreagras ris an fhad a tha riatanach.
NA tag an algairim a rèir fhad na h-iuchrach.
Till an dàta crioptaichte, an IV (veactor tòiseachaidh), agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptachadh.
Argamaidean:
- key: Na bytes airson iuchair crioptachaidh a ghineadh.
- data: An dàta ri chrioptachadh.
Till:
- An dàta crioptaichte, an IV, agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptachadh. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Crioptografaich an dàta leis an iuchair a’ cleachdadh modh CBC.
Tha na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 bytes) airson an dà chuid algorithms AES agus DES.
Tagh dìreach aon algorithm airson a chur an gnìomh agus cleachd ro-leasachan nan bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad a fhreagras ris an fhad a tha riatanach.
NA tag an algorithm stèidhichte air fad na h-iuchrach.
Till an dàta crioptografaichte, an IV (veactor tòiseachaidh), agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptografachadh.
Argamaidean:
- key: Na bytes airson iuchair crioptografachaidh a ghineadh.
- data: An dàta ri chrioptografachadh.
Till:
- An dàta crioptografaichte, an IV, agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptografachadh. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Crioptografaich an dàta leis an iuchair a’ cleachdadh modh CBC.
Tha na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 bytes) airson an dà chuid algorithms AES agus DES.
Tagh dìreach aon algorithm airson a chur an gnìomh agus cleachd am prefix de na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad a fhreagras ris an fhad a tha riatanach.
Na tagh an algorithm stèidhichte air fad na h-iuchrach.
Till an dàta crioptaichte, an IV (veactor tòiseachaidh), agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptachadh.
Argamaidean:
- key: Na bytes airson iuchair crioptachaidh a ghineadh.
- data: An dàta ri chrioptachadh.
Till:
- An dàta crioptaichte, an IV, agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptachadh. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Tha na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 bytes) airson an dà chuid algairim AES agus DES.
Tagh dìreach aon algairim airson a chur an gnìomh agus cleachd am prefix de na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad a fhreagras ris an fhad a tha riatanach.
NA tag an algairim a rèir fhad na h-iuchrach.
Till an dàta crioptaichte, an IV (veactor tòiseachaidh), agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptadh.
Argamaidean:
- key: Na bytes airson iuchair crioptadh a ghineadh.
- data: An dàta ri chrioptadh.
Till:

prompt_en:
/*
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
*/
func encryptData(key []byte, data []byte) (encryptedData []byte, iv []byte, aesKey []byte) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Crioptogaich an dàta leis an iuchair a’ cleachdadh AES agus modh CBC.
Tha na bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 bytes). Cleachd ro-leasachan nan bytes iuchair a chaidh a thoirt seachad a fhreagras ri an fhad a tha a dhìth.
Till an dàta crioptaichte, an IV (veactor tòiseachaidh), agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptachadh.

Argamaidean:
- key: Na bytes gus iuchair crioptachaidh a ghineadh (co-dhiù 16 bytes).
- data: An dàta ri chrioptachadh.

Tilleadh:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): An dàta crioptaichte, an IV, agus an iuchair a chaidh a chleachdadh airson crioptachadh.

prompt_en:
/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {

Pàirich an dàta XML agus till am fiosrachadh oileanach airson an ainm-cleachdaidh agus am facal-faire a chaidh a thoirt seachad. Bidh structar an dàta XML mar a leanas:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Cleachd na librichean seo:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

Faodaidh sinn ceist XPath a thogail agus an uairsin an ceist a chuir an gnìomh gus sgrùdadh a dhèanamh air an fhiosrachadh oileanach.

@param xmlData An dàta XML anns a bheil am fiosrachadh oileanach.
@param username Ainm-cleachdaidh an oileanaich a lorgar.
@param password Facal-faire an oileanaich a lorgar.

@return Tùpl (name, age, citizenship) ma lorgar an t-oileanach. Air neo, tillidh e sreathan falamh.
